global.description: The ad features a vibrant red background with a central product image and promotional text.
global.main_message: Promoting the CrispBox with a special sale and free shipping offer.

elements.label: Red background
elements.description: A solid red background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant base for the ad.

elements.label: CrispBox product image
elements.description: A rectangular outline representing the CrispBox product, centered in the ad with a simple design.

elements.label: Circular icon
elements.description: A small circular icon positioned below the product image, suggesting interaction or functionality.

elements.label: Circular icon
elements.description: Another small circular icon below the product image, similar in style to the previous one.

elements.label: Circular icon
elements.description: A third small circular icon below the product image, maintaining the same design theme.

elements.label: Promotional text
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'Your next favorite pick Free shipping over $25' positioned at the bottom of the ad.
elements.text_content: Your next favorite pick Free shipping over $25

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A prominent button with the text 'Install now' in white, encouraging immediate action.

elements.label: CrispBox logo
elements.description: The logo 'CrispBox' in bold text, located at the top left corner of the ad.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small yellow badge with the text 'SALE' in bold, positioned at the top right corner.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top left, the product image is centered, with promotional text and CTA at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Your next favorite pick, Free shipping over $25, €19.99, Install now, CrispBox, SALE
